notes_zh:
- **新增** 图片缩略图右下角显示格式标签（PNG / JPG / SVG / WEBP / HEIC 等），一眼看清格式不遮挡预览
- **修复** SVG 文件在列表中只显示通用图标、无法生成缩略图预览的问题
notes_en:
- **New** Show a format badge (PNG / JPG / SVG / WEBP / HEIC …) in the bottom-right corner of every image thumbnail — glanceable format info without covering the preview
- **Fix** SVG files were showing a generic document icon instead of a thumbnail; now render alongside other image formats
